PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?competition wdt:P1346 wd:Q6837797 .
  ?competition wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?competition rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "ncaa"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "tournament"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
